name: Ashish Kumar
bio: I'm an AI & Data Science undergraduate at IIT Guwahati who designs intelligent systems, agentic workflows, and data-driven products. My work combines machine learning, APIs, RAG, and full-stack engineering with a strong foundation in mathematics, physics, and structured problem solving.

bioHighlights.text: Experienced with scikit-learn, LangGraph, LangChain, REST APIs, LLM workflows, and RAG/agent design.
Built anomaly detection systems for commercial building meter data.
Designing full-stack AI systems like god-eyes and DeepOrra.
